hero.name: Jane Doe
hero.description: I build pixel-perfect, engaging, and accessible digital experiences. Let's create something truly exceptional together.

about.heading: About Me
about.content: Hello! I'm Jane, a passionate frontend developer based in San Francisco. I enjoy creating beautiful, functional web applications that solve real-world problems. My journey into web development started back in 2018, and since then I've been continuously learning and exploring new technologies. I specialize in React, Next.js, and modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind.

skills.heading: My Skills
skills.description: Here is a snapshot of the technologies I work with daily.

list.title: CryptoDash Analytics
list.description: A comprehensive dashboard for tracking cryptocurrency markets in real-time, featuring advanced data visualization and live price updates.

list.title: Aura eCommerce
list.description: A sleek, modern e-commerce mobile web application. Features a full shopping cart experience, headless CMS integration, and seamless checkout flow.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm currently open for new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
